policy_note: Confirmed through local Choice API probes. Choice HIGHLIMIT/LOWLIMIT are limit flags, not limit-price inputs. When Choice CSD returns entitlement error 10001012, the backend materializer may fill daily OHLCV, turnover, trading status, and limit prices from the localized Tushare stock fallback with audit status completed_tushare_fallback. Tushare stk_limit up_limit/down_limit populate the same HIGHLIMIT/LOWLIMIT keys as numeric prices for limit_ratio-style derivation; they are not the Choice flag semantics.

fields.confirmation_source: live Choice probe: sector('001004', as_of_date) returned SECUCODE/SECURITYSHORTNAME for A-share universe
live Choice probe: css(codes,'SW2021,SW2021CODE',EndDate=as_of_date,ClassiFication=1) returned industry names/codes
fields.description: SW2021 level-1 sector name and sector code.

fields.confirmation_source: live Choice probe: csd(codes,'PCTCHANGE,TURN,AMPLITUDE',as_of_date,as_of_date) returned numeric values
fields.unit: Percentage points for PCTCHANGE, TURN, and AMPLITUDE (e.g. 1.2 means 1.2%). Matches Tushare fallback: pct_chg and turnover_rate fields are already in percent points; amplitude is ((high-low)/pre_close)*100.
fields.description: Daily percent change, turnover, and amplitude for sector ranking.

fields.confirmation_source: live Choice probe: csd(codes,'OPEN,HIGH,LOW,CLOSE,VOLUME,AMOUNT',as_of_date,as_of_date) returned numeric OHLCV/amount
live Choice probe: csd(codes,'TRADESTATUS',as_of_date,as_of_date) returned normal trading status
live Choice probe: csd(codes,'HIGHLIMIT,LOWLIMIT',as_of_date,as_of_date) returned yes/no limit flags
fields.description: Daily up/down limit flags from Choice (HIGHLIMIT/LOWLIMIT are flags, not prices). Tushare fallback may place stk_limit prices in the same observation columns for limit_ratio; see policy_note.

fields.confirmation_source: live Choice probe: css(codes,'ISSURGEDLIMIT,ISDECLINELIMIT,HLIMITEDAYS,LLIMITEDDAYS',TradeDate=as_of_date) returned limit flags/streak counts
fields.description: Point-in-time limit-up/down flags and streak counts.
Optional real concept-board membership for Livermore theme breakout radar. Fill vendor_indicator and confirmation metadata only after a live Choice entitlement smoke test.
Optional intraday movement/event feed for Livermore theme breakout radar. Fill vendor_indicator and confirmation metadata only after a live Choice entitlement smoke test.
